details.failingMessage: Safe validation capture was attempted on this host, but the stored Shopify conformance access token is invalid and refresh failed: This request requires an active refresh_token.

notes: Planned draft order duplicate parity. The proxy request duplicates an existing draft order and expects a new draft-order ID/name/invoice URL plus copied customer, note, tags, attributes, totals, and line items. Local runtime support is limited to synthetic/staged draft orders until a live fixture settles broader Shopify behavior.
